name: Jordan Trimble
background: Jordan Trimble is the President and CEO of Skyharbour Resources. He has worked in the resource industry in various capacities with numerous TSX Venture listed companies and has a background in corporate finance and management. He has been instrumental in the growth and development of Skyharbour and has helped raise significant capital for the company.

company_affiliations.name: Skyharbour Resources Ltd.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: President, Chief Executive Officer, and Director
